rationale: EU accession launch for Ukraine and Moldova is directly relevant to Romania as a Black Sea neighbor and EU member bordering both countries; Iran deal matters for energy costs.

top_events.title: EU agrees launch of accession process for Ukraine and Moldova
top_events.summary: Romania borders both Ukraine and Moldova, making their EU accession path a major geopolitical and economic development — it affects regional stability, migration, and Romania's strategic importance within the EU.

top_events.title: Iran war: US and Tehran signal peace deal within reach; Hormuz reopening possible
top_events.summary: A ceasefire and Hormuz reopening would lower global energy prices, easing Romania's still-elevated energy costs and reducing inflationary pressure on households.

top_events.title: UAE to unlock frozen Iranian funds amid US ceasefire push
top_events.summary: Progress toward Iran deal reduces Middle East risk premium on oil and gas, offering indirect relief to Romanian consumers facing high energy bills.
